title: Trace cache key collisions
description: Decode how keys derive from requests to find collisions or missing value-affecting inputs.
body: Use when wrong or cross-tenant data is suspected from the cache. Actions: sample cache keys, decode how each was derived from its request, and check whether two distinct requests can map to one key or whether a varying input is absent from the key. Report any collision or missing-input finding with the offending key shape. Do not dismiss a data-leak report without inspecting key derivation. This skill is read-only and must not mutate keys without permission. Validation signals include a reproduced key derivation. Risk boundary: a collision that leaks another tenant's data is a security incident — escalate immediately.
